pharma.title: Alzheimer's Lormalzi therapy offers hope; doctors for early diagnosis, close monitoring
pharma.summary: Unlike conventional Alzheimer's drugs that largely manage memory loss and behavioural symptoms, donanemab targets amyloid-beta plaques ' abnormal protein deposits linked to the disease.
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.

pharma.title: Athena Behavioral Health opens Northeast’s largest integrated psychiatric hospital in Guwahati
pharma.summary: The new facility expands Athena’s network to five hospitals and aims to address rising mental health and addiction disorders in Assam, where nearly one in 12 people experience mental health morbidity.
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.

pharma.title: Kerala's 'Amma Manasu' emerges as model for maternal mental healthcare: WEF report
pharma.summary: The 'Amma Manasu' program in Kerala is transforming maternal mental health care into a global blueprint. Seamlessly integrating mental health support with routine medical check-ups, it embodies a holistic approach to motherhood. Celebrated in the latest World...

pharma.title: Isomorphic Labs secures US$2.1B funding to scale AI drug discovery | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
pharma.summary: Isomorphic Labs plans to use the new capital to further develop and deploy its proprietary AI drug design engine, known as IsoDDE.

pharma.title: Lesotho forms parliamentary caucus to tackle TB burden | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
pharma.summary: The newly established caucus aims to strengthen political leadership, policy development, financing, and accountability in the national fight against TB.

providers.title: Zain KSA obtains Managed Security Operations Center Tier 2 license
providers.summary: The achievement reflects the company’s commitment to supporting national efforts to strengthen cybersecurity

diagnostics.title: Etihad Credit Bureau launches tenant screening solution in collaboration with UAE PASS
diagnostics.summary: Innovative consent-based platform enables informed residential leasing by introducing credit scores in the real estate sector.
